{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012840BFD73998D4AC9AC57333"}"},"total":271},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596894459867071256","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书，真的写出了自己的东西，写出了自己的框架。不是照仿原著，可以说是非常好的哈利波特同人作品，可惜没有推流，流量不高。","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":38,"text":"哈利波特","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742005209AC57333%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227596894459867071256%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589248055019310142%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768792851,"group_id":"7589248055019310142","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N37UFQ4YKQuOH62wiG4yX3NAhGnU2p7gfxf3exkdjw4t","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4037848410883021","user_name":"用户40378484"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4037848410883021","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1647437225,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589248055019310142","book_info":{"abstract":"【克系+哈利波特+神秘侧+魔改】
我，古恩斯·科莱昂，十一岁。伦敦地下“新皇帝”，却收到霍格沃茨的羊皮入学信；
我以为是黑帮剧本，结果是克苏鲁版的魔法世界剧本。
要么入学，要么被“魔法部”摘除魔法器官。
从此，十一岁的黑帮教父披上校服，扛着反坦克火箭筒踏入对角巷。
“弥赛亚”智脑暴力解析魔咒，把魔力当代码写，无杖、无声、无底线，一路碾碎旧秩序。
我的信条：
只当皇帝，不当学生；
知识即暴力，黄金即真理；
若有人敢挡路——无论巫师、怪物还是旧神——我会给出他们无法拒绝的条件。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d457de4bf620dfb6d352fc76279101a3","author":"玉面钓蟹王","author_id":"","book_id":"7589248055019310142","book_name":"克系霍格沃茨：分院帽说我是旧日","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589248119825515070","read_count":"27011","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"486680"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"196","tags":"男频衍生,重生,都市异能,同人,克苏鲁,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/84c6175056cbda97a1422f8f68e64689~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384520&x-signature=d9Sf17CIGNTJMZzqPHG80IZgWsQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4041106881","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012840BFD73998D4AC9AC57333"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"fo
